sql.isNotEqual: AND DEPARTMENT NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE DEPT_CD_PATH LIKE '%trash\_dept%' ESCAPE '\' )

sqlMap.select: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# )

SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_PROXYINFO WHERE PROXYUSERID = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND StartDate < TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND EndDate > TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ) > 0

select.isEqual: SELECT REPLACE(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 'a=0;','a=1;') as EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT $v_FIELD$ FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT $v_FIELD$ FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
SELECT $v_FIELD$ FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'user' TYPE FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'dept' TYPE FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #v_CN#
AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = CN
AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 <> CN
AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 NOT LIKE 'trash\_dept\_%' ESCAPE '\' AND CN NOT LIKE 'trash\_dept\_%' ESCAPE '\'
AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) A ORDER BY A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, A.DISPLAYNAME

SELECT A.CN , A.DISPLAYNAME , A.TYPE FROM ( SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , 'dept' TYPE , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #v_CN#
AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 NOT LIKE 'trash\_dept\_%' ESCAPE '\' AND CN NOT LIKE 'trash\_dept\_%' ESCAPE '\'
AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) A ORDER BY A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, A.DISPLAYNAME

select.isEqual: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CN , MAIL , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'user' TYPE, TO_CHAR(extensionattribute7) JOBID, 'ROLEID' ROLEID, '' ISADDJOB FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE DEPARTMENT = #v_CN# AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT A.CN , A.MAIL , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(B.ORDERBY, '0'))) || NVL(B.ORDERBY, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'user' TYPE, b.jobid JOBID, b.roleid ROLEID, 'Y' ISADDJOB FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.DEPTID = #v_CN# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) AA ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 ASC, DISPLAYNAME ASC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CN , MAIL , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'user' TYPE, TO_CHAR(extensionattribute7) JOBID, 'ROLEID' ROLEID, '' ISADDJOB FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE DEPARTMENT = #v_CN# AND CN <> 'masteradmin' AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT A.CN , A.MAIL , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(B.ORDERBY, '0'))) || NVL(B.ORDERBY, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'user' TYPE, b.jobid JOBID, b.roleid ROLEID, 'Y' ISADDJOB FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.DEPTID = #v_CN# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) AA ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 ASC, DISPLAYNAME ASC

SELECT CN , MAIL , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'dept' TYPE, '' JOBID, '' ROLEID, '' ISADDJOB FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, DISPLAYNAME

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CN , MAIL , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'user' TYPE, TO_CHAR(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7) JOBID, 'ROLEID' ROLEID, '' ISADDJOB FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE DEPARTMENT = #v_CN# AND CN <> 'masteradmin' AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT A.CN , A.MAIL , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(B.ORDERBY, '0'))) || NVL(B.ORDERBY, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'user' TYPE, B.JOBID JOBID, B.ROLEID ROLEID, 'Y' ISADDJOB FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.DEPTID = #v_CN# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT CN , MAIL , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'dept' TYPE, '' JOBID, '' ISADDJOB FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) AA ORDER BY TYPE DESC, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, DISPLAYNAME ASC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 ASC, DISPLAYNAME ASC ) ROWNUM_ , CN , DISPLAYNAME , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , TYPE, jobid, roleid, isaddjob FROM ( SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'USER' TYPE, TO_CHAR(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7) jobid, 'ROLEID' roleid, '' isaddjob FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE DEPARTMENT = #v_CN# AND CN <> 'masteradmin' AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT A.CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(B.ORDERBY, '0'))) || NVL(B.ORDERBY, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'USER' TYPE, b.jobid jobid, b.roleid roleid, 'Y' isaddjob FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.DEPTID = #v_CN# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) AA ) BB WHERE ROWNUM_ >= #v_STARTROW# AND ROWNUM_ < #v_ENDROW# ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 ASC, DISPLAYNAME ASC

SELECT * FROM( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 ASC, DISPLAYNAME ASC ) ROWNUM_ , CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'DEPT' TYPE, '' jobid, '' isaddjob FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) AA WHERE ROWNUM_ >= #v_STARTROW# AND ROWNUM_ < #v_ENDROW# ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, DISPLAYNAME

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 ASC, DISPLAYNAME ASC ) ROWNUM_ , CN, DISPLAYNAME, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, TYPE, JOBID, ISADDJOB FROM ( SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'USER' TYPE, TO_CHAR(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7) jobid, 'ROLEID' roleid, '' isaddjob FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE DEPARTMENT = #v_CN# AND CN <> 'masteradmin' AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT A.CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(B.ORDERBY, '0'))) || NVL(B.ORDERBY, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'USER' TYPE, b.jobid jobid, b.roleid roleid, 'Y' isaddjob FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.DEPTID = #v_CN# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'DEPT' TYPE, '' jobid, '' isaddjob FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) AA ) BB WHERE ROWNUM_ >= #v_STARTROW# AND ROWNUM_ < #v_ENDROW# ORDER BY TYPE DESC, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, DISPLAYNAME

sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(CN) TOTALCOUNT FROM ( SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE DEPARTMENT = #v_CN# AND CN <> 'masteradmin' AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT B.CN FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.DEPTID = #v_CN# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AA

SELECT COUNT(CN) TOTALCOUNT FROM (
SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE DEPARTMENT = #deptCN# AND CN <> 'masteradmin' AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID#) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# UNION ALL
SELECT B.CN FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.DEPTID = #deptCN# AND B.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
UNION ALL
SELECT C.cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER C WHERE C.tenant_ID = #tenantID# AND cn <> 'masteradmin' AND cn NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID#) AND C.department IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND (INSTR(dept_cd_path, (SELECT CONCAT(dept_cd_path, ',') from TBL_DEPTMASTER where tenant_id = #tenantID# AND cn = #deptCN#)) = 1 OR extensionattribute1 = #deptCN#))
UNION ALL
SELECT D.cn FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER D JOIN TBL_USERMASTER E ON D.tenant_id = E.tenant_id AND D.cn = E.cn WHERE D.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND D.deptid IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE D.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND (INSTR(dept_cd_path, (SELECT CONCAT(dept_cd_path, ',') FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND cn = #deptCN#)) = 1) OR extensionattribute1 = #deptCN#)) AA
SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND extensionattribute1 = #deptCN# AND extensionattribute2 = dept_cd_path

select.isEqual: SELECT CN , CN DEPARTMENT , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DEPTNM , DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME1 , DISPLAYNAME2 , MAIL , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 ELSE COMPNM2 END EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , CASE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 WHEN null THEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 WHEN null THEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 ELSE (SELECT CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN A.DISPLAYNAME ELSE A.DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER A INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER B ON A.CN = B.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 WHERE B.CN = #v_CN# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) END EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , ADSPATH , UPDATEDT , 'dept' TYPE , TENANT_ID as tenantId FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
select.isNotEqual:
SELECT CN , CN DEPARTMENT , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DEPTNM , DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME1 , DISPLAYNAME2 , MAIL , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 ELSE COMPNM2 END EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , ADSPATH , UPDATEDT , 'dept' TYPE , TENANT_ID as tenantId FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = CN

sqlMap.select: SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME1 , DISPLAYNAME2 , MAIL , DEPARTMENT , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DESCRIPTION ELSE DESCRIPTION2 END DESCRIPTION , DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION1 , DESCRIPTION2 , PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN COMPANY ELSE COMPANY2 END COMPANY , COMPANY COMPANY1 , COMPANY2 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END TITLE , TITLE TITLE1 , TITLE2 TITLE2 , TELEPHONENUMBER , HOMEPHONE , MOBILE , FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER , STREETADDRESS , INFO , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , (CASE WHEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 IS NULL THEN CAST('' AS NVARCHAR2(200)) ELSE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 END) AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , ( CASE WHEN CN = ( SELECT D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER D WHERE D.CN = DEPARTMENT AND D.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) THEN ( SELECT E.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER E WHERE E.CN = DEPARTMENT AND E.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) ELSE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 END ) EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , ADSPATH , UPDATEDT , 'user' TYPE , SIPURI , POSITIONCD , 'user' USERTYPE FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND DEPARTMENT = #v_DEPTCD# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT A.CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN A.DISPLAYNAME ELSE A.DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , A.DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME1 , A.DISPLAYNAME2 , A.MAIL , C.CN DEPARTMENT , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN C.DISPLAYNAME ELSE C.DISPLAYNAME2 END DESCRIPTION , C.DISPLAYNAME DESCRIPTION1 , C.DISPLAYNAME2 DESCRIPTION2 , A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 ELSE C.COMPNM2 END COMPANY , C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 COMPANY1 , C.COMPNM2 COMPANY2 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN B.TITLE ELSE B.TITLE2 END TITLE , B.TITLE TITLE1 , B.TITLE2 TITLE2 , A.TELEPHONENUMBER , A.HOMEPHONE , A.MOBILE , A.FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER , A.STREETADDRESS , A.INFO , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , CAST(B.PROXY AS NVARCHAR2(200)) AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , ( CASE WHEN A.CN = ( SELECT F.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER F WHERE F.CN = DEPARTMENT AND F.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) THEN ( SELECT G.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER G WHERE G.CN = DEPARTMENT AND G.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) ELSE A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 END ) EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , A.ADSPATH , A.UPDATEDT , 'user' TYPE , SIPURI , B.POSITIONCD , 'addJob' USERTYPE FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON B.CN = A.CN AND B.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON C.CN = B.DEPTID AND C.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.CN = #v_CN# AND B.DEPTID = #v_DEPTCD# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

select.isEmpty: SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME1 , DISPLAYNAME2 , MAIL , DEPARTMENT , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DESCRIPTION ELSE DESCRIPTION2 END DESCRIPTION , DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION1 , DESCRIPTION2 , PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN COMPANY ELSE COMPANY2 END COMPANY , COMPANY COMPANY1 , COMPANY2 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END TITLE , TITLE TITLE1 , TITLE2 TITLE2 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN '0' ELSE '0' END ROLE , '' ROLE1 , '' ROLE2 , TELEPHONENUMBER , HOMEPHONE , MOBILE , FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER , STREETADDRESS , INFO , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , (CASE WHEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 IS NULL THEN CAST('' AS NVARCHAR2(200)) ELSE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 END) AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 ELSE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 END EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , ADSPATH , UPDATEDT , 'user' TYPE , SIPURI , POSITIONCD , 'user' USERTYPE FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND DEPARTMENT = #v_DEPTCD# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
select.isNotEmpty:
SELECT A.CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN A.DISPLAYNAME ELSE A.DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , A.DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME1 , A.DISPLAYNAME2 , A.MAIL , C.CN DEPARTMENT , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN C.DISPLAYNAME ELSE C.DISPLAYNAME2 END DESCRIPTION , C.DISPLAYNAME DESCRIPTION1 , C.DISPLAYNAME2 DESCRIPTION2 , A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 ELSE C.COMPNM2 END COMPANY , C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 COMPANY1 , C.COMPNM2 COMPANY2 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN B.TITLE ELSE B.TITLE2 END TITLE , B.TITLE TITLE1 , B.TITLE2 TITLE2 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN B.ROLE ELSE B.ROLE2 END EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , B.ROLE ROLE , B.ROLE ROLE1 , B.ROLE2 ROLE2 , A.TELEPHONENUMBER , A.HOMEPHONE , A.MOBILE , A.FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER , A.STREETADDRESS , A.INFO ,
B.ROLL_INFO AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 ,
A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 ,
A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , CAST(B.PROXY AS NVARCHAR2(200)) AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , B.JOBID as EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 ELSE A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 END ORIGIN_ROLE, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , A.ADSPATH , A.UPDATEDT , 'user' TYPE , SIPURI , B.POSITIONCD , 'addJob' USERTYPE FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON B.CN = A.CN AND B.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON C.CN = B.DEPTID AND C.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.CN = #v_CN# AND B.DEPTID = #v_DEPTCD# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND B.JOBID = #JOBID# AND B.ROLEID = #ROLEID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME1 , DISPLAYNAME2 , MAIL , MAILNICKNAME , UPNNAME , DEPARTMENT , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DESCRIPTION ELSE DESCRIPTION2 END DESCRIPTION , DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION1 , DESCRIPTION2 , PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN COMPANY ELSE COMPANY2 END COMPANY , COMPANY COMPANY1 , COMPANY2 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END TITLE , TITLE TITLE1 , TITLE2 TITLE2 , TELEPHONENUMBER , HOMEPHONE , FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER , MOBILE , STREETADDRESS , POSTALCODE , INFO , REPLACE(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 'a=0;', 'a=1;') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 ELSE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 END EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE101 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , ADSPATH , UPDATEDT , 'user' TYPE , ' ' DISPLAYNAMEPRINTABLE , POSITIONCD , BIRTH , BIRTHTYPE , FURIGANA , EXTENSIONPHONE , OFFICEMOBILE , MANUAL_FLAG AS MANUALFLAG FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = LOWER(#v_CN#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

SELECT CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END TITLE , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 ELSE COMPNM2 END COMPANY, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN ROLE ELSE ROLE2 END ROLE FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER B ON A.DEPTID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.CN = #v_PCN# AND A.DEPTID = #v_PDEPT# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
AND A.JOBID = #v_jobID#
SELECT TITLE, TITLE2, ROLE, ROLE2 FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER WHERE CN = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND DEPTID = #dept# AND JOBID = #jobID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET $v_PROPNAME$ = #v_PROPVALUE# WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
UPDATE TBL_DEPTMASTER SET $v_PROPNAME$ = #v_PROPVALUE# WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_PROXYINFO WHERE USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) > 0
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PROXYINFO SET PROXYUSERID = #v_PROXYUSERID#, PROXYUSERNAME = #v_PROXYUSERNAME#, PROXYUSERDEPTID = #v_PROXYUSERDEPTID#, STARTDATE = TO_DATE(#v_STARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), ENDDATE = TO_DATE(#v_ENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') WHERE USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PROXYINFO ( USERID, PROXYUSERID, PROXYUSERNAME, PROXYUSERDEPTID, STARTDATE, ENDDATE, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_USERID#, #v_PROXYUSERID#, #v_PROXYUSERNAME#, #v_PROXYUSERDEPTID#, TO_DATE(#v_STARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), TO_DATE(#v_ENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #v_TENANT_ID# )
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PROXYINFO WHERE USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT displayname$lang$ AS displayname, cn, title$lang$ AS title, birth, birthtype FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE ((birth LIKE CONCAT('%-', CONCAT(#month#, '-%')) AND birthtype = 'Y') OR (birth <> '' AND birthtype = 'N')) AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId# AND cn NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId#)
UNION ALL
SELECT C.displayname$lang$ AS displayname, A.cn, A.title$lang$ AS title, C.birth, C.birthtype AS birthtype FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER B ON A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.deptid = B.cn AND B.extensionattribute2 = #companyId# JOIN TBL_USERMASTER C ON A.tenant_id = C.tenant_id AND A.cn = C.cn WHERE ((C.birth LIKE CONCAT('%-', CONCAT(#month#, '-%')) AND C.birthtype = 'Y') OR (C.birth <> '' AND C.birthtype = 'N')) AND A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND C.physicaldeliveryofficename <> #companyId# AND A.cn NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId#) ) ORDER BY SUBSTR(birth, 8, 10)

select.isEqual:
SELECT * FROM(
SELECT cn, department as displayName, n'' as extensionAttribute15, 'user' as type, displayname as NAME, TO_CHAR(extensionAttribute7) JOBID, 'ROLEID' ROLEID, '' ISADDJOB FROM TBL_USERMASTER A $strSQL$ AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND DEPARTMENT NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%' ESCAPE '\'
AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# $strSQLCom$
AND CN <> 'masteradmin'
AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId#)
UNION ALL
SELECT A.cn, deptid as displayName, n'' as extensionAttribute15, 'user' as type, displayname as NAME, A.JOBID JOBID, A.ROLEID ROLEID, 'Y' ISADDJOB FROM TBL_USERMASTER B INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID $strGyumjikForOracle$ AND DEPARTMENT NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%' ESCAPE '\'
AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# $strSQLAddjobCom$
AND A.DEPTID IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId#)
UNION ALL
SELECT cn, n'' as displayName, n'' as extensionAttribute15, 'group' as type, displayname as NAME, '' JOBID, '' ISADDJOB FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER $strSQL$ AND CN NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%' ESCAPE '\'
AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId#
$strSize$ ) ORDER BY type DESC, ISADDJOB DESC, NAME ASC

SELECT cn, n'' as displayName, n'' as extensionAttribute15, 'group' as type, '' JOBID, '' ISADDJOB FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER $strSQL$ AND CN NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%' ESCAPE '\'
AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# $strSQLCom$

SELECT * FROM (SELECT ROWNUM as RNUM, cn, displayName, extensionAttribute15, type, jobid, roleid, isaddjob FROM (SELECT cn, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END as userName, department as displayName, '' as extensionAttribute15, '0' as addJobflag, 'user' as type, TO_CHAR(extensionattribute7) JOBID, '' ROLEID, '' ISADDJOB FROM TBL_USERMASTER A $strSQL$ $strSQLCom$ AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND DEPARTMENT NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%' ESCAPE '\' AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND CN <> 'masteradmin'
UNION ALL
SELECT a.cn , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END as userName, deptid as displayName , '' as extensionAttribute15, '1' as addJobflag, 'user' as type, a.jobid JOBID, A.ROLEID ROLEID, 'Y' ISADDJOB FROM TBL_USERMASTER b INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A ON a.cn = b.cn AND a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id $strSQL$ AND DEPARTMENT NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%' ESCAPE '\'
AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# $strSQLAddjobCom$ ) A ORDER BY A.addJobflag, A.userName
) B WHERE RNUM >= #startRow# AND RNUM < #endRow#

select * from ( SELECT cn, department as displayName, '' as extensionAttribute15, 'user' as type, TO_CHAR(extensionAttribute7) JOBID, '' JOBID, '' ISADDJOB FROM TBL_USERMASTER A $strSQL$ AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND DEPARTMENT NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%' ESCAPE '\'
AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
UNION ALL
SELECT A.cn, deptid as displayName, '' as extensionAttribute15, 'user' as type, b.jobid JOBID, A.roleid ROLEID, '' ISADDJOB FROM TBL_USERMASTER B INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN $strSQL$ AND DEPARTMENT NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%' ESCAPE '\'
AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID
UNION ALL
SELECT CN, '' as displayName, '' as extensionAttribute15, 'group' as type, '' JOBID, '' ROLEID, '' ISADDJOB FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER $strSize$ AND CN NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%' ESCAPE '\'
AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) C WHERE RNUM >= #startRow# AND RNUM < #endRow#

select * from ( SELECT cn, '' as displayName, '' as extensionAttribute15, 'group' as type, '' JOBID, '' ROLEID, '' ISADDJOB FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER $strSQL$ AND CN NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%' ESCAPE '\'
AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) A WHERE RNUM >= #startRow# AND RNUM < #endRow#

sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTALCOUNT FROM ( SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER A $strSQL$ AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND DEPARTMENT NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%' ESCAPE '\'
AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND CN <> 'masteradmin' UNION ALL
SELECT A.CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER B INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A ON a.cn = b.cn and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id $strSQL$ AND DEPARTMENT NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%' ESCAPE '\'
AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) A

SELECT COUNT(cn) FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE extensionattribute1 = #deptID#
AND extensionattribute2 <> CN
AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
SELECT 'top,Top,' || dept_cd_path FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE cn = #deptID# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#

SELECT cn , cn deptid , CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN displayname ELSE displayname2 END displayname, CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN displayname ELSE displayname2 END deptnm, displayname displayname1 , displayname2 , mail , compnm2 , extensionattribute1 , extensionattribute2 , CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN extensionattribute3 ELSE compnm2 END extensionattribute3, extensionattribute4 , extensionattribute5 , extensionattribute6 , extensionattribute7 , extensionattribute8 , extensionattribute9 , extensionattribute10 , extensionattribute11 , extensionattribute12 , extensionattribute13 , extensionattribute14 , extensionattribute15 , adspath , updatedt , 'dept' type FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE cn = #userID# AND tenant_id = #v_TENANT_ID#
SELECT password FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE cn = #userID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE mail = #email# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT CONNECTTIME FROM ( SELECT ( RANK() OVER(ORDER BY CONNECTTIME DESC)) AS RNUM, CONNECTTIME FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO WHERE USERID = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY CONNECTTIME DESC ) A WHERE A.RNUM='2'

SELECT CONNECTIP FROM ( SELECT ( RANK() OVER(ORDER BY CONNECTTIME DESC)) AS RNUM, CONNECTIP FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO WHERE USERID = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY CONNECTTIME DESC ) A WHERE A.RNUM='2'

SELECT CN , TENANT_ID tenantId FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #TENANTID# AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #TENANTID#) AND DEPARTMENT = #v_DEPTID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 LIKE '%a=1;%'
SELECT USERID, PROXYUSERID, PROXYUSERNAME, PROXYUSERDEPTID, STARTDATE, ENDDATE FROM TBL_PROXYINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND USERID = #userID#
SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #deptId#
SELECT DEPT_CD_PATH FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND CN = #deptId#
SELECT CN, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 = #extension4#
SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE DEPT_CD_PATH LIKE '%' || #v_PARENTID# || '%' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #v_COMPANYID#
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND CN = #userID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET LISTTYPE = #listType# WHERE CN = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT LISTTYPE FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyID#
SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

SELECT CN, DISPLAYNAME, MAIL FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE DEPARTMENT = #deptId# AND (CN LIKE #searchValue# ESCAPE '\' OR DISPLAYNAME LIKE #searchValue# ESCAPE '\') AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY DISPLAYNAME
SELECT CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #extensionAttribute9# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
SELECT department FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER SET PROXY = #proxyInfo# WHERE CN = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND DEPTID = #dept#
AND JOBID = #jobId#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT PROXY FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER WHERE CN = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND DEPTID = #dept#
AND TITLE = #title#
SELECT CN ,DEPARTMENT ,TITLE ,TITLE2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT physicaldeliveryofficename FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenantid = #tenantId#
SELECT ROLL_INFO FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND DEPTID = #v_DEPTID# AND JOBID = #v_JOBID#

SELECT CN, DEPARTMENT, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 as jobID FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 LIKE '%' || #v_PERMISSION_CODE# || '%'
UNION ALL SELECT CN, DEPTID , UNISTR(ROLL_INFO) AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, UNISTR(jobID) FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND ROLL_INFO LIKE '%' || #v_PERMISSION_CODE# || '%'

SELECT U.CN, D.CN AS DEPARTMENT, J.JOBID AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7, U.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME as COMPANYID, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN J.TITLE ELSE J.TITLE2 END AS TITLE, J.TITLE as TITLE1, J.TITLE2, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN D.DISPLAYNAME ELSE D.DISPLAYNAME2 END AS DESCRIPTION, D.DISPLAYNAME AS DESCRIPTION1, D.DISPLAYNAME2 AS DESCRIPTION2, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN U.COMPANY ELSE U.COMPANY2 END AS COMPANY, U.COMPANY AS COMPANY1, U.COMPANY2 FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER J INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER D ON D.CN = J.DEPTID AND D.TENANT_ID = J.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_USERMASTER U ON U.CN = J.CN AND U.TENANT_ID = J.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_USER_JOBMASTER JM ON J.JOBID = JM.JOBID AND J.TENANT_ID = JM.TENANT_ID
WHERE J.CN = #v_CN# AND J.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ORDER BY JM."TYPE", JM.SORT, (CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN D.DISPLAYNAME ELSE D.DISPLAYNAME2 END) ASC

SELECT CN, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME1, DISPLAYNAME2, MAIL, DEPARTMENT, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DESCRIPTION ELSE DESCRIPTION2 END DESCRIPTION, DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION1, DESCRIPTION2, PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN COMPANY ELSE COMPANY2 END COMPANY, COMPANY COMPANY1, COMPANY2, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END TITLE, TITLE TITLE1, TITLE2 TITLE2, TELEPHONENUMBER, HOMEPHONE, MOBILE, FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER, STREETADDRESS, INFO, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4, (CASE WHEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 IS NULL THEN CAST('' AS NVARCHAR2(200)) ELSE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 END) AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ADSPATH, UPDATEDT, 'user' TYPE, SIPURI, POSITIONCD, 'user' USERTYPE, '' JOBID FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT A.CN, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN A.DISPLAYNAME ELSE A.DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME, A.DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME1, A.DISPLAYNAME2, A.MAIL, C.CN DEPARTMENT, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN C.DISPLAYNAME ELSE C.DISPLAYNAME2 END DESCRIPTION, C.DISPLAYNAME DESCRIPTION1, C.DISPLAYNAME2 DESCRIPTION2, A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 ELSE C.COMPNM2 END COMPANY, C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 COMPANY1, C.COMPNM2 COMPANY2, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN B.TITLE ELSE B.TITLE2 END TITLE, B.TITLE TITLE1, B.TITLE2 TITLE2, A.TELEPHONENUMBER, A.HOMEPHONE, A.MOBILE, A.FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER, A.STREETADDRESS, A.INFO, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4, CAST(B.PROXY AS NVARCHAR2(200)) AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, A.ADSPATH, A.UPDATEDT, 'user' TYPE, SIPURI, B.POSITIONCD, 'addJob' USERTYPE, JOBID FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON B.CN = A.CN AND B.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON C.CN = B.DEPTID AND C.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.CN = #v_CN# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
SELECT MAIL FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
